events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Sol Kai-II whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

diaries.text:
**Ember Sto** (earth/sentinel) — Year 71

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Ember Sto, sentinel*

**Fen Marsh** (water/healer) — Year 71

The water in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Fen Marsh, healer*

**Rust Vega** (earth/engineer) — Year 71

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Rust Vega, engineer*
